technical_replicate: quantitative mass spectrometry-based proteomics using Tandem Mass Tags (TMT) labelling...
experimental_design: immortalized vs normal, transformed vs normal, transformed vs immortalized
Three separate proteomics datasets were generated where immortalized vs. normal (I vs N), transformed vs. normal (T vs N), and transformed vs. immortalized (T vs I) were compared...
factor_value: the protein abundance level in these cells was compared with lysates derived from three immortalized (I) BM-hMSC lines... and three fully transformed (T) BM-hMSC lines...
